property.description: Detect abnormal traffic patterns originating from UEs leading to sustained high-rate GTP-U flows
property.operator: <event value="COMPUTE" event_id="1" description="Moderate traffic rate from an UE on N3" boolean_expression="(gtpu.teid != 0) && (ip.src != ip.dst) && (gtpu.packet_rate < @normal_packet_rate) && (gtpu.byte_volume < @normal_byte_volume)"/>

event.description: Sustained high traffic rate from an UE on N3
